title: How to extract the first word (text before the first space)
task: Pull the first word from a cell, e.g. a first name out of a full name.
explanation: FIND locates the position of the first space; LEFT then takes every character before it. FIND(' ','John Smith') is 5, so LEFT(...,4) returns 'John'. Wrap in IFERROR for cells that have no space.
